description: Pinned contract fixtures for registry_version v1: slim (abi + creation bytecode) Foundry build artifacts the integration-test harness deploys from. VolumeRegistry is the versioned contract; PostageStamp / PriceOracle / TestToken are vendored test-support contracts (the live deployments wire to the production postage stack, not these).

verified_against.method: eth_getCode runtime bytecode vs this build's deployedBytecode, immutable references masked; runtime body matched byte-for-byte on both deployments (metadata hash differs: post-deploy source-text drift, same solc)
